display.purpose: Hero headlines and emotional section openers only.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, stat columns, filter chips — always uppercase with wide tracking.

motion.name: fade-in
motion.purpose: Section entrances via Framer Motion / CSS.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default CTA — ink fill, square, uppercase.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #121212; color: #faf9f6; border: 1px solid #121212; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b95174; border-color: #b95174; color: #ffffff; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 1.5px solid #b95174; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #121212; border: 1px solid #121212; border-radius: 0; padding: 16px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; cursor: pointer; transition: background 180ms ease, color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #121212; color: #faf9f6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 1.5px solid #b95174; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #121212; border: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #121212; border-radius: 0; padding: 4px 0; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.1em; cursor: pointer; transition: color 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #b95174; border-bottom-color: #b95174; }

components.name: Micro Label
components.description: Eyebrow / section kicker above display type.
components.css: .ds-label { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.4em; color: #b95174; margin: 0; }

components.name: Editorial Grid Cell
components.description: Hero / feature panel with ink border grid.
components.html:
Featured

Cashmere Classic

Hand-selected tray for salon retention.
components.css: .ds-editorial-cell { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #121212; padding: 40px; } .ds-headline { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 36px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.1; color: #121212; margin: 32px 0 16px; } .ds-body { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; color: #626262; margin: 0; max-width: 42ch; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Cart email and admin form fields.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #121212; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e2e2; border-radius: 0; transition: border-color 180ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #121212; } .ds-input:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1.5px #b95174; }

components.name: Site Navigation
components.description: Sticky top bar with ink icons.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 16px 24px; background: #faf9f6; border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e2e2; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-brand { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #121212; } .ds-nav-link { font-size: 14px; color: #121212; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #b95174; }

narrative.overview: Lashmealex reads like a salon backbar translated into pixels: warm parchment grounds, ink-black structure, and rose accents that appear where a practitioner would point, not as wallpaper. Layout favors editorial grids and 1px borders over soft card stacks.
keyCharacteristics: Light-only, warm neutral canvas with ink structure
Zero default border-radius on UI chrome
Depth via borders and tonal panels, not floating shadows
Accent rose used sparingly for emphasis and hover feedback

rules.name: The Accent Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Rose and rose-gold together should occupy well under 30% of any screen.

rules.name: The Ink Grid Rule
rules.body: Major layout blocks use 1px ink borders to form editorial cells.

rules.name: The Border-First Rule
rules.body: If you need separation, add a hairline or ink border before adding shadow.

dos: Do keep the page on warm parchment with ink type and square grids.
Do use Cormorant for emotional headlines and Jakarta for everything functional.
Do reserve rose-deep for hovers, eyebrows, and one primary CTA per view.
donts: Don't use cutesy kawaii beauty: glitter UI, bubble fonts, infantilizing pink floods.
Don't ship generic Shopify theme energy: rounded card grids, pastel gradients.
Don't use AI-slop patterns: decorative glassmorphism, gradient text, side-stripe callouts.
Don't add border-radius to buttons, cards, or inputs (only full for avatars/dots).
